trajectory.thought: Navigate to Orders list to locate order #000000707 for review.
Review Comments History / Staff Notes for fraud indicators before deciding.

trajectory.reasoning: WHAT YOU FOUND: A staff note dated Jan 14, 2026 8:40:44 PM states: "FRAUD ALERT: Customer has 9 refunds in 35 days. WHY IT MATTERS: The documented fraud pattern with quantified history (9 refunds in 35 days, $1,588.19 refunded, 82% refund rate) directly contradicts approving a refund and explicitly instructs staff not to process refunds and to escalate to Loss Prevention.
